name: Modern Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1. To make the marinade, combine chili powder, garlic (minced), cocoa powder, cayenne pepper, salt, tomato paste, and tequila in a blender or food processor. Blend until smooth.
2. Pour the marinade over the flank steak and mix well to coat evenly. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
3. Light a grill and allow the coals to become white hot.
4. Carefully place the marinated steak on the grill. Cook to your desired doneness.
5. Once cooked, transfer the steak to a cutting board and slice diagonally across the grain into strips about 1/2 inch thick.
6. While the steak is cooking, warm the tortillas on the grill by turning them once. Place the warmed tortillas in a covered bowl to keep them warm.
7. Arrange the sliced meat in a serving dish. Serve with guacamole, chopped tomatoes, salsa, chopped onions, and cilantro.
